// note: Base config ONLY — never invoked directly (there is intentionally no tsconfig.json at the repo root). Each workspace (apps/server, apps/web, packages/shared) has its own tsconfig that `extends` this and sets its own `types` + `include`. This file used to be tsconfig.json, which made a bare `tsc` at root glob the whole monorepo without per-workspace types → ~194 phantom bun:test / testing-library errors. Type-check per workspace.
